calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Continued To Jul-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sanford Taylor, In Propria Persona (415-519-6106) appears as self-represented plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Caroline A. Pham of the law offices of Fisher Phillips (415-490-9024) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT GLOBAL EXPERIENCE SPECIALISTS, INC.'s Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And Discovery Responses is GRANTED IN PART. Plaintiff is to sit for his deposition on or before May 25, 2018. Plaintiff is to answer all pending discovery requests without objections on or before May 25, 2018. Plaintiff is sanctioned $1,000, which is to be paid on or before May 25, 2018. When he filed this case, pro per plaintiff Sandford Taylor provided an address in San Francisco and a telephone number where he could be reached. Defendant Global Experience Specialists, Inc. has served discovery requests that were signed for at the address plaintiff provided. Plaintiff suggests others living at the address may have signed. Defendant's counsel has also left several voicemail messages at the number plaintiff provided. Plaintiff told the judge pro tem he did not want to communicate with counsel and thus did not pick up her calls and deleted each of her voicemail messages without listening to them.

Written order is signed and filed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.org (L&M302)
Defendant now moves for terminating sanctions or, in the alternative, to compel plaintiff's deposition and discovery responses, and for monetary sanctions.

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Continued To Apr-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Caroline A. Pham, Esq. of Fisher Phillips, Tel. 415.490.9024, appearing for defendant/moving party Global Experience Specialists, Inc.
Sandford Taylor, Tel. 415.519.6106, plaintiff/opposing party, appeared by telephone.

Matter called, no appearance by the plaintiff, Sandford Taylor. There being no appearance by the plaintiff, the Court places a call to Sandford Taylor at the above-indicated telephone number in open court. Mr. Taylor is to return the Court's call within 1 hour.

At the second call of the matter, Sandford Taylor, plaintiff in pro per appears by telephone.

Plaintiff Sandford Taylor Does Not stipulate to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Melinda Derish.

The Court questions Mr. Taylor regarding his address and telephone number. Discussions are held. Sanford Taylor stated that he does not have email and provides the following two addresses in open court:
1867 16th Avenue, San Francisco, CA, 94122
12000 Oat Gap Road, Potter Valley, CA 95469.

Notice is given in open court by Ms. Pham. Ms. Pham provides her firm's address, her phone number, and email address in open court for Mr. Taylor.

Mr. Taylor is advised in open court of the two upcoming hearing dates:
April 24, 2018 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 206.
April 26, 2018 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

There being a non-stip by the plaintiff to Judge Pro Tem Derish, Defendant Global Experience Specialists, Inc.'s Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And Discovery Responses is continued to April 26, 2018 at 9:30 a.m., Law & Motion. Judge Pro Tem Melinda Derish is to prepare a report and recommendation. Judge Pro Tem Derish will send the report and recommendation to Sandford Taylor's San Francisco address.

Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, Tel. 415.274.9977. =(302/JPT/HEK)
